3214230.name: Craft Master
3214230.description: Craft Master is a relaxing puzzle game where players restore and assemble charming objects. Player needs to place the parts to correct places on the objects to restore, repair or assamble.  With its cozy atmosphere and casual gameplay, Craft Master offers a satisfying experience for players who is a puzzle enthusiasts or just looking for a relaxing break.
3214230.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 丹麦语, 芬兰语, 日语, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典语, 泰语, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
